index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Space Shooter</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#000;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400;
const STARS=Array.from({length:80},(_,i)=>({x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*H,s:Math.random()*2+0.5,sp:Math.random()*1.5+0.5}));
let player={x:280,y:340,w:24,h:28,shield:false,shieldTimer:0,tripleShot:false,tripleTimer:0};
let bullets=[],enemies=[],enemyBullets=[],particles=[],powerups=[];
let score=0,lives=3,wave=1,dead=false,shootCool=0,waveTimer=0,keys={};
function spawnWave(){
  enemies=[];
  const rows=Math.min(2+Math.floor(wave/2),4);
  const cols=Math.min(3+wave,7);
  for(let r=0;r<rows;r++)for(let c=0;c<cols;c++){
    enemies.push({x:60+c*(W-120)/(cols-1||1),y:30+r*55,vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*2,vy:0.5+wave*0.1,hp:1+(wave>3?1:0),shootTimer:Math.random()*120});
  }
}
function explode(x,y,col){
  for(let i=0;i<12;i++){
    const a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,sp=Math.random()*4+1;
    particles.push({x,y,vx:Math.cos(a)*sp,vy:Math.sin(a)*sp,life:30,col:col||'#ff9800'});
  }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{keys[e.key]=true;if(e.key===' ')e.preventDefault();});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
function update(){
  if(dead)return;
  if(keys['ArrowLeft']||keys['a'])player.x=Math.max(12,player.x-5);
  if(keys['ArrowRight']||keys['d'])player.x=Math.min(W-12,player.x+5);
  if(keys['ArrowUp']||keys['w'])player.y=Math.max(12,player.y-5);
  if(keys['ArrowDown']||keys['s'])player.y=Math.min(H-20,player.y+5);
  if((keys[' ']||keys['z'])&&shootCool<=0){
    bullets.push({x:player.x,y:player.y-16,vy:-10});
    if(player.tripleShot){
      bullets.push({x:player.x-12,y:player.y-8,vy:-9,vx:-1});
      bullets.push({x:player.x+12,y:player.y-8,vy:-9,vx:1});
    }
    shootCool=8;
  }
  if(shootCool>0)shootCool--;
  if(player.shieldTimer>0)player.shieldTimer--;
  else player.shield=false;
  if(player.tripleTimer>0)player.tripleTimer--;
  else player.tripleShot=false;
  STARS.forEach(s=>{s.y=(s.y+s.sp)%H;});
  bullets=bullets.filter(b=>{
    b.x+=(b.vx||0);b.y+=b.vy;
    enemies.forEach(e=>{
      if(b.x>e.x-20&&b.x<e.x+20&&b.y>e.y-14&&b.y<e.y+14){
        e.hp--;b.y=-20;
        if(e.hp<=0){explode(e.x,e.y,'#f48fb1');score+=100;e.dead=true;
          if(Math.random()<0.12)powerups.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,type:Math.random()<0.5?'shield':'triple'});
        }
      }
    });
    return b.y>0;
  });
  enemies=enemies.filter(e=>!e.dead);
  enemies.forEach(e=>{
    e.x+=e.vx;e.y+=e.vy;
    if(e.x<20||e.x>W-20)e.vx=-e.vx;
    e.shootTimer--;
    if(e.shootTimer<=0){enemyBullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y+14,vy:3});e.shootTimer=80+Math.random()*100;}
    if(e.y>H){lives--;e.dead=true;if(lives<=0)dead=true;}
  });
  enemyBullets=enemyBullets.filter(b=>{
    b.y+=b.vy;
    if(Math.abs(b.x-player.x)<16&&Math.abs(b.y-player.y)<16){
      if(player.shield){b.y=H+10;}
      else{lives--;b.y=H+10;explode(player.x,player.y,'#4fc3f7');if(lives<=0)dead=true;}
    }
    return b.y<H;
  });
  powerups=powerups.filter(p=>{
    p.y+=1.5;
    if(Math.abs(p.x-player.x)<20&&Math.abs(p.y-player.y)<20){
      if(p.type==='shield'){player.shield=true;player.shieldTimer=300;}
      else{player.tripleShot=true;player.tripleTimer=300;}
      return false;
    }
    return p.y<H;
  });
  particles=particles.filter(p=>{p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.life--;return p.life>0;});
  if(enemies.length===0){wave++;spawnWave();}
}
function drawShip(x,y){
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor='#7b2fff';ctx.shadowBlur=16;
  ctx.fillStyle='#7b2fff';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-14);ctx.lineTo(x-12,y+14);ctx.lineTo(x+12,y+14);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='#b47fff';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-6);ctx.lineTo(x-7,y+10);ctx.lineTo(x+7,y+10);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();
  if(player.shield){
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,200,255,0.7)';ctx.lineWidth=3;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,22,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.restore();
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor='#00bcd4';ctx.shadowBlur=6;
  ctx.fillStyle='#00e5ff';
  ctx.fillRect(x-2,y+14,4,8);
  ctx.restore();
}
function drawEnemy(e){
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor='#f06292';ctx.shadowBlur=10;
  ctx.fillStyle='#f06292';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(e.x+10,e.y);ctx.lineTo(e.x,e.y+14);ctx.lineTo(e.x-10,e.y);ctx.lineTo(e.x,e.y-14);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x,e.y,5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.restore();
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#03010f';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  STARS.forEach(s=>{
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,255,255,${0.3+s.s*0.3})`;
    ctx.fillRect(s.x,s.y,s.s>1.5?2:1,s.s>1.5?2:1);
  });
  bullets.forEach(b=>{
    ctx.save();ctx.shadowColor='#00e5ff';ctx.shadowBlur=8;
    ctx.fillStyle='#00e5ff';
    ctx.fillRect((b.x||0)-2,b.y,4,10);
    ctx.restore();
  });
  enemyBullets.forEach(b=>{
    ctx.fillStyle='#ff5252';ctx.fillRect(b.x-2,b.y,4,8);
  });
  powerups.forEach(p=>{
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle=p.type==='shield'?'#00bcd4':'#ffd600';
    ctx.shadowColor=ctx.fillStyle;ctx.shadowBlur=12;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='9px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(p.type==='shield'?'S':'T',p.x,p.y+3);
    ctx.restore();
  });
  enemies.forEach(drawEnemy);
  drawShip(player.x,player.y);
  particles.forEach(p=>{
    ctx.globalAlpha=p.life/30;
    ctx.fillStyle=p.col;
    ctx.fillRect(p.x-2,p.y-2,4,4);
  });
  ctx.globalAlpha=1;
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,20);
  ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('Wave '+wave,300,20);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Lives: '+lives,590,20);
  if(player.tripleShot){ctx.fillStyle='#ffd600';ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.fillText('TRIPLE SHOT',10,40);}
  if(player.shield){ctx.fillStyle='#00bcd4';ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.fillText('SHIELD ON',10,player.tripleShot?56:40);}
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('WASD/Arrows move  SPACE shoot',300,395);
  if(dead){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.75)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#f44336';ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',W/2,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,240);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='16px monospace';ctx.fillText('Reload to play again',W/2,290);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
spawnWave();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
